items.summary: In ActivateSportScreen, import useSport from SportContext and destructure sportStatus, currentSport, and deactivateSport. Derive a boolean isActive = sportStatus === 'active'.

In ActivateSportScreen, replace the static activation button label with a dynamic label: when isActive is true display 'Deactivate {currentSport}' (e.g. 'Deactivate Soccer'), otherwise display 'Activate My Sport'.
In ActivateSportScreen, update the button's onClick handler so that when isActive is true it calls deactivateSport(), and when isActive is false it calls the existing handleActivate() function.
